stemHtml: An aircraft is flying from Position A (53°N, 10°35’W) to Position B (53°N, 51°45'E). Its average ground speed is equal to 375 kt. The time difference to UTC is 1 hour for Position A and 4 hours for Position B. Assuming the aircraft arrives at Position B on August 5th, 15:00 ST, what is its time of departure from Position A?
